channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (short_term)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Demi Lovato @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-05-12 03:00 — Demi Lovato at Chase Center. Demi Lovato's tour promises a strong live performance and personal storytelling, appealing to a wide audience.

item.title: Lewis Capaldi @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-05-04 02:00 — Lewis Capaldi at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Lewis Capaldi's emotional ballads and powerful voice make for a compelling live experience.

item.title: Charlie Puth @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-05-02 02:30 — Charlie Puth at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. Charlie Puth's pop hits and engaging stage presence are sure to attract a large crowd.

item.title: RAYE @ The Theater at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-05-11 03:00 — RAYE at The Theater at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. RAYE's upcoming tour is generating buzz with new music, appealing to fans eager for fresh material.

item.title: Levity @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-05-10 02:00 — Levity at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. The Wood Brothers blend folk and rock, known for their captivating live performances.

item.title: Yebba @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-05-07 03:00 → 2026-05-08 03:00 — Yebba at The Fillmore. Yebba's soulful voice and emotional depth will resonate well in an intimate setting.

item.title: Pennywise @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-05-09 03:00 — Pennywise at The Fillmore. Pennywise's punk energy and loyal fanbase make for an exciting live show.

item.title: Good Kid @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-05-07 03:00 — Good Kid at Fox Theater - Oakland. Good Kid's unique sound and engaging stage presence will attract a diverse audience.

item.title: Florence + The Machine @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-05-16 02:30 — Florence + The Machine at Chase Center. Florence + The Machine's theatrical performances are a must-see for indie music fans.

item.title: Bob Moses @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-18 02:30 — Bob Moses at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Rainbow Kitten Surprise's eclectic style and energetic performances are highly anticipated.

item.title: SANAM @ Paramount Theatre Oakland
item.description: 2026-05-11 02:00 — SANAM at Paramount Theatre Oakland. James Blake's innovative sound and emotional performances are a highlight for fans.

item.title: Rainbow Kitten Surprise @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-19 03:00 — Rainbow Kitten Surprise at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Bob Moses' blend of electronic and live music creates a captivating concert atmosphere.

item.title: Santana @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-08-10 02:00 — Santana at Shoreline Amphitheatre. Santana's legendary status and collaboration with The Doobie Brothers promise a memorable concert.

item.title: Lagwagon @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-05-17 02:00 — Lagwagon at The Fillmore. Lagwagon's celebration of their legacy will resonate with long-time punk fans.

item.title: The Afghan Whigs @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-05-20 02:30 — The Afghan Whigs at The Fillmore. The Afghan Whigs' anniversary tour promises a nostalgic experience for fans.

item.title: The Adicts @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-05-24 03:00 — The Adicts at The Fillmore. The Adicts' unique style and high-energy shows are a draw for punk rock enthusiasts.

item.title: Cazzu @ San Jose Civic
item.description: 2026-05-01 03:00 — Cazzu at San Jose Civic. Cazzu's live performance is expected to be vibrant and engaging, appealing to a diverse audience.

item.title: The Wood Brothers @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-05-06 03:00 — The Wood Brothers at The Fillmore.
